title: Thawing of mouse embryonic fibroblasts (MEFs) for hPSC cultures
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"afhbg","text":"This protocol describes the thawing of mouse embryonic fibroblasts (MEFs) as feeder cells for human pluripotent stem cell (hPSC) culture.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9upe2","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bunhp","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3ec1l","text":"General notes","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":13}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1fr66","text":"1. Throughout this protocol, the term hPSC is used to collectively refer to both hiPSCs and hESCs. All described procedures have been tested and work equally well for hiPSCs and hESCs.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5q4d9","text":"2. steps: To recover frozen stocks for MEF expansion, P0 MEF tubes will be thawed in a water bath at 37 °C by gently shaking
Thawed cells are transferred into a 15 ml conical tube containing 9 ml pre-warmed MEF medium. Centrifuge the tube at 250 x g, °C, 5 minutes
Resuspended MEFs (10x10 6 cells/10 cm plate) are plated in fresh MEF medium and maintained in a humidified incubator (37°C; 5% CO2)
3-4 days after thawing, the cells should be ready for passaging (90-95% confluent)

MEF medium A B 1 DMEM 435 ml 2 FB Essence/FBS* 75 ml 3 200mM L-Glutamine 5 ml 4 Penicillin & Streptomycin (100x) 5 ml 5 MEM Non-Essential Amino Acids 5 ml *We have successfully used either FB Essence or FBS and have not observed an obvious difference. Final volume: 500ml
creator: Hanqin Li
